backingDescription: RBN is a protocol/governance token and is not documented as a direct reserve-backed, collateral-backed, fund-share, note, or redeemable RWA claim token.

_meta.notes: For governance_protocol classification, direct backingType, custodian, redemptionAsset, and proof-of-reserves are not applicable and therefore left null/false. Do not treat Ribbon vault collateral or protocol TVL as RBN backing.
